pages.title: Forge Energy Conversion
pages.text: The Quantum Vacuum Turbine converts entropy into standard Forge Energy (FE). This allows you to power other mods' machines!

pages.title: Quantum Vacuum Turbine
pages.text: The ultimate power generation machine. Connects to your entropy network. Requires Neutrion Ingot, Gold, Blast Furnace, Observer, and Diamond.

pages.title: Ancient Battery
pages.text: Stores Forge Energy. Can hold up to 1M FE. Output: 1024 FE/tick. Use with machines that require FE input.

pages.title: FE Generation Stats
pages.text: Turbine conversion rates:$(br)- 1 Entropy = 10 FE$(br)- Processing time: 200 ticks$(br)- Output: 256 FE/tick$(br)$()For maximum output, upgrade your pyramid tier to increase entropy generation!
